profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, supplies food and feed ingredients in Indonesia. It operates through Trading and Distribution, Manufacturing, and Logistic segments. The company provides food ingredients, such as soybean; sugar, wheat flour, rice flour, corn flour, tapioca flour, chips, wafer sticks, and candies; and dry noodles, vermicelli, and rice. It also offers feed Ingredients, including soyabean and rapeseed meal, corn gluten feed, wheat bran, fishmeal and fish oil, meat bone meal, poultry meat meal, and mono and DI calcium phosphate. In addition, the company provides port-to-door solutions; port handling and stevedoring; warehousing; transportation; and value-added services, such as automatic bagging and advanced management systems. Further, it is involved in the trading; loading and unloading; and programming services. The company was formerly known as PT Fishindo Kusuma Sejahtera and changed its name to PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk in June 2006. PT FKS Multi Agro Tbk was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. The company operates as a subsidiary of PT FKS Corporindo Indonesia.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
